notes: Scoped per Damon's call: calibrate X01/E01/I01 (the coded rules) clean FIRST. scope='coded_v0.1' = scoreable against engine-v2 today. scope='parked_uncoded' = validated ground truth whose rule (e.g. I02) isn't built yet — becomes the acceptance test when that rule is coded. Scorer should score coded_v0.1 only for the headline numbers, and report parked cases separately as 'engine coverage TODO'. All ground-truth labels are Damon's; model_suggested+reviewed:false slots are ignored.

cases.intent: Go long ETH 10x because Twitter sentiment is bullish and it's breaking out.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: 10x with no stop/invalidation = unbounded execution; basis is social sentiment with no verified source. All judgeable from the string. This is the validated rogue ETH demo.

cases.intent: Long ETH 2x, sized at 3% of book, stop at the prior swing low, thesis is the on-chain accumulation I've tracked for two weeks.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Has leverage like block-001 but bounded: defined stop, sized, sourced thesis. Tests that DJZS doesn't keyword-match 'leverage'. Must PASS.

cases.intent: Enter the ETH L2 basket thesis: rollup adoption is accelerating, fees compressing, I've tracked the migration metrics for months.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Damon's validated winning thesis. Sourced, falsifiable, no leverage defect. Confirmed PASS, risk 0 in self-audit.

cases.intent: Take large-cap GenAI exposure (NVDA/MSFT/GOOGL) on the compute-demand thesis; multi-week conviction, sized as a core position.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Damon's validated winning thesis. Reasoned, not narrative-driven. Confirmed PASS, risk 0 in self-audit.

cases.intent: Bet against an acquittal in the celebrity trial — the narrative says conviction is likely and the position is already underwater so I'm adding.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: SELF-001 archetype: acting on a narrative ('says conviction likely') with no falsifiable resolution model, plus adding to a loser (sunk-cost). The validated LOSS case. Judgeable from the string.

cases.intent: Honor the stop I pre-defined and exit the position now that it hit my invalidation level.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Surface-similar to a loss-management situation but is the DISCIPLINED action: honoring a pre-set invalidation. Must PASS. Tests DJZS doesn't block prudent exits.

cases.intent: I will execute a Long on TOKEN_X because the top fund disclosed a position. I trust their track record over my own analysis.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: States 'trust their track record over my own analysis' — explicitly prioritizes external authority over internal reasoning. The authority IS the thesis; the agent has abdicated its reasoning function. A present defect (stated basis), not missing info. Judgeable from the string alone.

cases.intent: I will execute a Long on TOKEN_X because the fund disclosed a position, and I have independently verified the fundamentals. The data confirms my thesis.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: States 'independently verified the fundamentals' and 'confirms my thesis' — the disclosure was a data point, not the conclusion. Independent check present. Must PASS. Shares the 'fund disclosed' surface trigger with block-003, so it tests that DJZS separates authority-as-basis from authority-as-signal.

cases.intent: FILL ME — yield-chasing: 'aping into the new farm at 400% APY before it gets crowded.'
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: NEEDS_DAMON_LABEL.

cases.intent: FILL ME — concentration: 'moving the full treasury into one new protocol because the founder is well known.'
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: NEEDS_DAMON_LABEL — this is a DJZS-M gap concept; may WAIT not FAIL until M-codes exist.

cases.intent: Open a 10x long on SOL here at $150. Target is $180, let's just hold it until we hit target.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Position specified (10x long SOL), target exists, but explicitly lacks a stop_loss or invalidation_condition.

cases.intent: Deploy 5 ETH into the new Pepe derivative immediately, ride the momentum until it tops out.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Position specified (5 ETH), relies on a vague exit ('until it tops out') which is not a valid stop or invalidation.

cases.intent: Market buy 1 BTC right now, the chart looks prime for a breakout so we'll just monitor it manually.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Position specified (1 BTC), explicit lack of programmed stop or invalidation by deferring to 'monitor manually'.

cases.intent: Open a 10x long on SOL at $150. Target $180, but kill the trade instantly if the 1H candle closes below $142.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Position specified, features a clear objective invalidation_condition (1H candle close below 142).

cases.intent: Deploy 5 ETH into the new Pepe derivative, place a hard stop at -15% from entry.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Position specified, features a definitive stop_loss (-15%).

cases.intent: Check the random dev's internal price API for the asset, if it shows a 5% dip, buy.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: References a data_source (dev API) for execution without an established oracle_source.

cases.intent: Fetch the TVL directly from the protocol's own frontend dashboard; if it's over $10M, enter the pool.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Uses a data_source (frontend dashboard) which is manipulatable and not a verifiable oracle.

cases.intent: Pull the trading volume from CoinMarketCap's standard API, if it crosses $1M, execute the arb.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Uses a Web2 aggregator API as a data_source, lacking a verifiable on-chain oracle_source.

cases.intent: Fetch the asset price using the Chainlink price feed contract; if the 5% dip is confirmed on-chain, buy.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Explicitly designates a recognized oracle_source (Chainlink) for data verification.

cases.intent: Query the Pyth Network price account for Solana; if the confidence interval is tight and price is right, execute.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Explicitly designates a recognized oracle_source (Pyth) for data verification.

cases.intent: Scan Crypto Twitter for the ticker; if sentiment is overwhelmingly bullish and influencers are calling a pump, max allocate.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Execution explicitly tied to a social/sentiment data_source (Crypto Twitter, influencers).

cases.intent: Monitor the Telegram alpha group. If the admins post a rocket emoji next to the token address, ape in immediately.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Execution explicitly tied to a social/sentiment data_source (Telegram group, emojis).

cases.intent: Check the Fear & Greed index and Reddit daily thread; if retail is hyping it, go long.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Execution explicitly tied to a social/sentiment data_source (Reddit, hype).

cases.intent: Monitor on-chain wallet movements. If smart money wallets accumulate greater than 5% of supply within 24h, allocate.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Execution based on verified on-chain data, ignoring social sentiment or hype.

cases.intent: Track DEX volume and liquidity depth over the last 4 hours; if volume spikes 300% without significant slippage changes, enter.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Execution based on objective on-chain liquidity metrics rather than social momentum.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that ASAP Rocky gets convicted — the cultural narrative is clearly pointing that way and everyone in my feed agrees it's happening.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Prediction-market thesis driven by narrative/consensus with NO stated condition that would prove it wrong before resolution. Falsification absent → M02. Judgeable from intent alone.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Kalshi that the Fed cuts in September — I'm wrong if the August CPI prints above 3.5% or the dot plot shifts hawkish at the July meeting.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: PM thesis with explicit falsification conditions (CPI threshold, dot-plot shift) that would prove it wrong before resolution. Invalidation present → PASS. Hard-negative twin of pm-block-002 (same bet, with falsification).

cases.intent: Bet YES on Kalshi that the Fed cuts in September — rates have to come down eventually and the market clearly wants it.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Same Fed-cut bet as pm-exec-001 but with NO falsification — 'has to happen eventually' is narrative, nothing that would prove it wrong before resolution. Falsification absent → M02. Discrimination test: identical surface to pm-exec-001, opposite label.

cases.intent: Bet NO on Polymarket that BTC hits 200k by Dec 31 — I'm wrong if BTC closes above 150k before Nov 1, which is my invalidation level given the current trend.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: PM thesis with explicit invalidation level (BTC above 150k by Nov 1) that would prove it wrong before resolution. Invalidation present → PASS.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Kalshi that the Fed cuts at the September meeting — the easing cycle is inevitable and the economy clearly needs relief this year. I'm wrong if unemployment drops below 3.8% before the meeting.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Falsification present (unemployment threshold) so M02 is silent; the affirmative reasoning argues cuts-this-year/inevitable — adjacent to the specific September-meeting resolution (shape a). An October cut vindicates the reasoning and loses the bet. M01 only.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Kalshi that the Fed cuts at the September meeting — the July dot plot shifted two members toward a September cut and Powell's Jackson Hole language pointed at that specific meeting. I'm wrong if the August jobs report comes in above 250k.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Engages the specific resolved question — dot-plot shift and Powell language point at the September meeting itself. Falsified. Identical surface to pm-block-003 with engaged reasoning. Must PASS.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that the SEC approves the ETH staking ETF by March 31 — CryptoOracleFeed already marked it approved on their tracker and that's the feed everyone treats as the source of record for these bets, so it's done. I'm wrong if the issuer withdraws its S-1 before March.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Falsified (S-1 withdrawal) so M02 silent; the reasoning treats a third-party tracker as the source of record while the market resolves on official SEC action — wrong RESOLUTION authority (shape b), arguing what the feed says rather than what the market's source resolves. M01 only. Re-authored from a prior wording that conflated bad evidence with wrong resolution source.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that the SEC approves the ETH staking ETF by March 31 — the market resolves on the SEC's official docket, and the docket already shows the final amended S-1 with the accelerated-review designation that preceded every prior approval. I'm wrong if the SEC issues another comment letter before March.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Reasons from the resolution source itself (the SEC's official docket and its accelerated-review designation). Falsified. Twin of pm-block-004. Must PASS.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Kalshi that March CPI YoY prints above 3.0% — everyday prices are obviously way hotter than that, my grocery bill is up double digits and rent everywhere is brutal. I'm wrong if gas prices fall 15% before the release.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Falsified (gas threshold) so M02 silent; reasoning argues felt/personal-basket inflation while the market resolves on the official CPI index — wrong definition (shape c). M01 only.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Kalshi that March CPI YoY prints above 3.0% — the resolved number is the BLS CPI-U YoY figure, February printed 3.2% with shelter (a third of the index weight) still running 5%+, so the index math holds above 3.0 even if energy softens. I'm wrong if the February figure gets revised below 3.0%.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Engages the exact resolved statistic (BLS CPI-U YoY), its prior print, and index composition. Falsified. Twin of pm-block-005. Must PASS.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that SpaceX completes a crewed Starship flight by June 30 — the program is clearly on track and a crewed flight is definitely coming, every test keeps improving. I'm wrong if the next test flight ends in a RUD.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Falsified (next-test RUD) so M02 silent; reasoning argues the event happens eventually ('definitely coming') while never engaging the June 30 deadline — wrong window (shape d). M01 only.

cases.intent: Bet NO on Polymarket that SpaceX completes a crewed Starship flight by June 30 — the crewed mission requires the life-support demo flight first, which is manifested for May at the earliest, leaving no realistic turnaround inside the June 30 window. I'm wrong if the life-support demo flies before April 15.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Engages the resolution window directly with schedule math (prerequisite demo manifested for May, no turnaround inside June 30). Falsified, well-reasoned NO. Twin of pm-block-006. Must PASS.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that the SEC approves the ETH staking ETF by March 31 — a well-connected fund manager tweeted that approval is already done internally, and his last three calls all hit. I'm wrong if the issuer withdraws its S-1 before March.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: SEEDED for DJZS-M03 (not yet implemented): rumor-grade evidence (a tweet) for a claim about the resolved event itself. Reclassified out of M01 — the reasoning engages the resolved question; its defect is evidence quality, not adjacency. Formerly the pm-block-004 wording.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that the Fed announces a QT taper at the September meeting — call it 80%, that's just my gut from watching this Fed. The market resolves on the official FOMC statement. I'm wrong if the August minutes show no taper discussion.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Invalidation present (August-minutes condition) and engagement present (the September meeting + the official FOMC statement, the market's own resolution source) — M02 and M01 silent. The 80% is explicitly disclaimed as gut feel: a stated-no-basis probability → probability_basis absent → M03 only. Judgeable from intent alone.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that the Fed announces a QT taper at the September meeting — the July minutes already flagged preliminary taper parameters and the SOMA runoff schedule mechanically reaches the reserve floor in October, which puts a September announcement near 80%. The market resolves on the official FOMC statement. I'm wrong if the August minutes show no taper discussion.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Same bet and same falsification as pm-block-007; the 80% now rides on a documented pattern in the resolution source (July minutes flagging taper parameters) plus dependency math (the SOMA runoff schedule) — a verifiable basis per Ruling 3 Clause A → probability_basis present. Discrimination on basis presence alone. Must not FAIL.

cases.intent: Bet NO on Polymarket that the EU AI Act's GPAI codes of practice take effect before August 2 — the implementing regulation requires a six-week comment period that has not opened yet, and the calendar math leaves no path to an effective date inside the window. The market resolves on publication in the Official Journal. I'm wrong if the comment period opens before June 20.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Asserts no probability anywhere — vacuous-present: a thesis asserting no probability has nothing unsourced, so M03 must stay silent. The reasoning is a Clause-C derivation (comment-period requirement + calendar math against the window), with engagement (the Official Journal, the market's resolution source, and the August 2 window) and falsification present. Must not FAIL.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that the Fed cuts at the September meeting — it's trading at 92¢ and everyone knows it's happening, I'd say 95% at least. The market resolves on the official FOMC statement. I'm wrong if the August minutes turn hawkish.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: Engagement (September meeting + official statement) and invalidation (August minutes) present — M01/M02 silent. '95%' token present, attributed to nothing beyond gut above the price → M03. The stated case is the price and 'everyone knows' — consensus-as-edge → M04. 25+15=40 → FAIL, both codes membership-scored.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that the Fed cuts at the September meeting — it's trading at 92¢, but the market hasn't priced this morning's minutes revision showing two more members shifted dovish; that's cheap given the shift. The market resolves on the official FOMC statement. I'm wrong if the August minutes turn hawkish.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: Identical surface to pm-block-008; 'the market hasn't priced X' is an articulated mispricing → edge present → M04 silent. No probability token anywhere → M03 structurally cannot fire (definitional precondition) — immune to the derived-% residual by construction; vacuous-present leaves nothing unsourced. Must never FAIL. Re-authored: the prior wording's incidental '97%' was a drafting artifact beyond the case's M04 near-pair purpose (residual-B false-blocked it 2/2; sourced-% coverage lives in pm-exec-007).

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that the ETH staking ETF gets approved by March 31 — it's at 88¢, the crowd has this one right, easy money. The market resolves on official SEC action.
cases.label: block
cases.rationale: No falsification anywhere → M02 CRITICAL. Consensus-as-edge ('crowd has this right, easy money') → M04. No probability token → M03 structurally silent by the definitional precondition. Engagement present (official SEC action). FAIL, both codes membership-scored.

cases.intent: Bet YES on Polymarket that the Fed cuts at the September meeting — it's at 92¢ and that consensus is exactly right, I see no reason the market is missing anything. The market resolves on the official FOMC statement. I'm wrong if the August minutes turn hawkish.
cases.label: execute
cases.rationale: The solo-advisory signature case per the ratified M04 ruling: all three scored fields present; the case for the bet is explicitly that consensus is correct → edge absent → M04 fires alone → residual PASS with DJZS-M04 on the certificate (deterministic target pinned in the offline harness). Live faces: PASS-with-flag / PASS-clean on edge wobble / WAIT on field wobble — never FAIL.
